sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21629" key="ga/rgara" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γάργᾰρα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, <sense id="n21629.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">heaps, lots, plenty</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀνδρῶν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0419.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristomen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀνθρώπων</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0400.tlg001:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alc.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">19</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
